vehicle: Concept: Falcon Heavy + modified Dragon (or equivalent)
payload: 2-person crew (~6000 kg habitat + life support for 501 days)
credit: © Inspiration Mars Foundation — 2013 concept by Dennis Tito for a 501-day crewed Mars free-return flyby in the 2018 launch window. Trajectory uses Earth → Mars flyby → Earth free-return geometry; no Mars orbit insertion. Programme did not proceed to flight; included here as a published architecture for cislunar/cismartian free-return reference.

links.l: A crewed mission to Mars... in 501 days (Tito et al., IEEE Aerospace 2013)
